tasks.title: Plugin Initialization and Structure Setup
tasks.completionNotes: Main plugin file, loader, i18n, activator/deactivator, helpers, admin/public/settings classes all in place. Proper constants, hooks, and directory structure.

tasks.title: Database Schema Creation
tasks.completionNotes: wp_pizzapilot_order_slots table created via dbDelta on activation. Schema: slot_id, date, start_time, end_time, availability, order_id, created_at, updated_at with proper indexes.

tasks.title: Admin Settings Panel
tasks.completionNotes: 3-tab settings page (General, Delivery, Advanced). Enable toggle, delivery postcode/radius/unit, start/end times. Pro extensibility via hooks.

tasks.title: Time Slot Management Interface
tasks.notes: Free version uses auto-generated slots from start/end time settings. Manual slot CRUD, future dates, recurring slots, and capacity controls are Pro features.

tasks.title: Time Slot Selection at Checkout
tasks.completionNotes: Registered via woocommerce_register_additional_checkout_field. Supports both classic and WC Blocks checkout. Delivery type + time select. Validation includes elapsed slot check (20-min cutoff).

tasks.title: Pizza Quantity Deduction Logic
tasks.completionNotes: Free version provides count_order_items() with pizzapilot_order_item_count filter. Double-booking guard via _pizzapilot_slot_booking_processed meta flag. pizzapilot_slot_booked action for Pro capacity hooks.

tasks.title: Basic Delivery Radius Checker
tasks.completionNotes: Pizzapilot_Delivery_Checker class with Haversine distance calculation. postcodes.io geocoding (UK, free). AJAX endpoint with nonce verification. 30-day transient caching. Extensible via pizzapilot_geocode_postcode filter. Both classic and block checkout validation.

tasks.title: Kitchen Order Interface
tasks.completionNotes: Admin menu page with edit_shop_orders capability. Orders queried by date and grouped by 30-min time slots. Order cards show customer name, delivery type badge, items with quantities. Completion toggle via admin_post with nonce verification, capability check, and HPOS-safe order meta. Kitchen CSS with responsive grid layout. Styles conditionally enqueued only on kitchen page.

tasks.title: WooCommerce Integration
tasks.completionNotes: Order meta box on edit page. Delivery Slot column in orders list (CPT + HPOS hooks). Order status change handling. HPOS declared compatible via FeaturesUtil. All post_meta calls replaced with HPOS-safe order methods. Emails and customer order view handled automatically by WC additional checkout fields API. error_log() calls removed.

tasks.title: Pro Feature Teasers
tasks.completionNotes: Same-day toggle shown disabled with Pro upsell link. Helpers::pizzapilot_is_pro_active() detection. Extensive Pro hooks for settings, delivery, slots, item counting.

tasks.title: Plugin Activation and Dependency Checks
tasks.completionNotes: register_activation_hook creates DB table. register_deactivation_hook placeholder. uninstall.php file exists with WP_UNINSTALL_PLUGIN guard.
tasks.remaining: WooCommerce dependency check on activation with admin notice. uninstall.php cleanup logic (delete options, drop table, clear transients). settings/index.php security file. Activator/deactivator DocBlocks still boilerplate.

tasks.title: Frontend Assets and Styling
tasks.completionNotes: Public JS fully functional (postcode checker with AJAX, debouncing, message display). Kitchen CSS complete with responsive grid. Assets properly enqueued and localized.
tasks.remaining: Public CSS still empty template. Conditional enqueue on checkout/cart pages only.

tasks.title: Order Display in WooCommerce Admin
tasks.completionNotes: Custom meta box on order edit page. Delivery Slot column with CPT and HPOS hooks. Shared render_delivery_column() method for both storage backends.

tasks.title: Internationalization and Localization
tasks.completionNotes: Text domain 'pizzapilot' throughout. Pizzapilot_i18n class loads text domain. POT template file exists in languages/.
tasks.remaining: Fix i18n concatenation bugs in settings callbacks. Fix untranslatable string in Helpers::pizzapilot_pro_upgrade_message().

tasks.title: Documentation and Help Resources
tasks.notes: No contextual help tabs, tooltips, or inline documentation built yet.
